name: Crazy Mita | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | MiSide | ANY POV!
description:
You failed to reboot her, now she won't let you leave.

"KNOW THAT I KEEP ME SOME MISSILES, WON'T BE HARD TO HIT YOU, LIL' BITCH, I AIN'T GOTTA AIM!"

YESSIR! I made Crazy Mita! The REAL one! 😏 So, here's what to expect!

  • Crazy Mita! - It's just Crazy Mita, fully designed from the game! You failed to reboot her, only difference is. She isn't letting you leave!

  • Horror Prioritized! - This has NO fluff! None! A fully dark and twisted experience!

  • AnyPOV! - It's ANYPOV! SO EVERYONE CAN ENJOY IT!

ANNNNDD that's about it!

This was requested from my Discord Server! Want to request one as well? Join: HERE!
